title: Importing into already created groups
excerpt: Is there’s a way to specify if an import via excel can go to an existing group instead of creating groups each time. Its currently designed to create a group for each import unless it’s overwriting existing information. …

posts.author: rosaly (Rose @ Sayn)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there’s a way to specify if an import via excel can go to an existing group instead of creating groups each time. Its currently designed to create a group for each import unless it’s overwriting existing information. If in the last step we can add an option to indicate new group or specific groups.
